<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Ritzy — Client Onboarding Portal</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --green:#3AB526;
  --green-dark:#278A18;
  --green-deep:#155C0E;
  --green-light:#EAF7E6;
  --green-mid:#C2EDBA;
  --black:#0A0F0A;
  --surface:#F5FBF4;
  --white:#FFFFFF;
  --grey:#6B7A6B;
  --grey-light:#E8F0E7;
  --font-head:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;
  --font-body:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
  --radius:14px;
  --radius-sm:8px;
  --shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(58,181,38,0.10);
  --shadow-card:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:var(--font-body);background:var(--surface);color:var(--black);min-height:100vh;}

/* NAV */
nav{
  background:var(--white);
  border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--green-mid);
  padding:0 40px;
  height:64px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;
}
.nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.nav-logo img{height:38px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;}
.nav-badge{
  background:var(--green-light);
  color:var(--green-dark);
  font-family:var(--font-head);
  font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;
  letter-spacing:0.03em;
}
.nav-right{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--green-dark);}

/* HERO */
.hero{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0A2E05 0%,#155C0E 45%,#1E7A12 100%);
  padding:56px 40px 52px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.hero::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 50%,rgba(58,181,38,0.18) 0%,transparent 65%);
}
.hero::after{
  content:'RITZY';
  position:absolute;right:-20px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:160px;font-weight:800;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);letter-spacing:-8px;line-height:1;
  pointer-events:none;user-select:none;
}
.hero-inner{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:640px;}
.hero-client-tag{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;
  padding:5px 14px;border-radius:20px;margin-bottom:18px;
  letter-spacing:0.04em;
}
.hero-client-tag span{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);display:inline-block;}
.hero h1{
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:36px;font-weight:800;
  color:#fff;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:10px;
  letter-spacing:-0.5px;
}
.hero h1 em{color:var(--green);font-style:normal;}
.hero-tagline{
  font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  font-weight:400;margin-bottom:28px;letter-spacing:0.02em;
}
.hero-steps-row{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.hero-step-pill{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14);
  padding:7px 14px;border-radius:30px;
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
}
.hero-step-pill .pill-num{
  width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--green);color:#fff;
  font-size:10px;font-weight:700;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;
}

/* PROGRESS TRACKER */
.progress-section{padding:32px 40px 0;}
.progress-section h2{
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--grey);letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px;
}
.progress-track{
  display:flex;align-items:center;
  background:var(--white);
  border:1.5px solid var(--green-mid);
  border-radius:var(--radius);
  padding:20px 28px;gap:0;
}
.prog-item{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;position:relative;}
.prog-item:not(:last-child)::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:18px;left:50%;right:-50%;
  height:2px;background:var(--grey-light);z-index:0;
}
.prog-circle{
  width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;
  position:relative;z-index:1;margin-bottom:8px;flex-shrink:0;
}
.prog-done{background:var(--green);color:#fff;}
.prog-active{background:var(--white);border:2.5px solid var(--green);color:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 0 4px var(--green-light);}
.prog-todo{background:var(--grey-light);color:var(--grey);}
.prog-label{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--black);text-align:center;}
.prog-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--grey);margin-top:2px;text-align:center;}

/* MAIN CONTENT */
.main{padding:28px 40px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 340px;gap:20px;align-items:start;}

/* STEP CARDS */
.steps-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}
.step-card{
  background:var(--white);
  border:1.5px solid var(--grey-light);
  border-radius:var(--radius);
  padding:24px;
  transition:border-color 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.step-card:hover{border-color:var(--green-mid);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.step-card.active-card{border-color:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--green-light);}
.step-card::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;width:4px;
  background:var(--grey-light);border-radius:4px 0 0 4px;
}
.step-card.done::before{background:var(--green);}
.step-card.active-card::before{background:var(--green);}
.step-card.pending::before{background:var(--grey-light);}

.card-top{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
.card-icon-wrap{
  width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:10px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0;
}
.icon-green{background:var(--green-light);}
.icon-amber{background:#FEF9E7;}
.icon-purple{background:#F5EEF8;}
.status-badge{
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;
  padding:4px 10px;border-radius:20px;letter-spacing:0.04em;flex-shrink:0;
}
.badge-done{background:#D5F5E3;color:#1E8449;}
.badge-progress{background:#FEF9E7;color:#B7770D;}
.badge-pending{background:var(--grey-light);color:var(--grey);}

.card-num-title{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;}
.step-num{
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--green);letter-spacing:0.05em;
}
.card-title{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--black);}
.card-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--grey);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:16px;}
.card-meta{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;
  padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid var(--grey-light);
  margin-bottom:16px;
}
.meta-item{font-size:12px;color:var(--grey);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
.meta-icon{font-size:14px;}
.card-btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;
  background:var(--green);color:#fff;
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;
  padding:10px 20px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
  border:none;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;
  transition:background 0.15s,transform 0.1s;
  letter-spacing:0.01em;
}
.card-btn:hover{background:var(--green-dark);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.card-btn.secondary{
  background:var(--white);color:var(--green-dark);
  border:1.5px solid var(--green-mid);
}
.card-btn.secondary:hover{background:var(--green-light);}
.card-btn.disabled{background:var(--grey-light);color:var(--grey);cursor:not-allowed;}
.card-btn.disabled:hover{transform:none;}

/* SIDEBAR */
.sidebar{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;}

.info-card{
  background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--grey-light);
  border-radius:var(--radius);padding:20px;
}
.info-card-title{
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--grey);letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:14px;
}
.info-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--grey-light);}
.info-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;padding-bottom:0;}
.info-icon{font-size:16px;width:28px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.info-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--grey);}
.info-val{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--black);}

/* CONTACT CARD */
.contact-card{
  background:var(--green-deep);
  border-radius:var(--radius);padding:20px;
}
.contact-card .info-card-title{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);}
.contact-avatar{
  width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--green);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;
  margin-bottom:12px;
}
.contact-name{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:2px;}
.contact-role{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);margin-bottom:16px;}
.contact-btns{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;}
.contact-btn{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14);
  border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
  padding:10px 14px;color:#fff;
  font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;
  cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;
  transition:background 0.15s;
}
.contact-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);}
.contact-btn-icon{font-size:15px;}

/* TIMELINE */
.timeline-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--grey-light);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:20px;}
.timeline-row{display:flex;gap:12px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--grey-light);align-items:center;}
.timeline-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.timeline-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;}
.dot-green{background:var(--green);}
.dot-amber{background:#E67E22;}
.dot-grey{background:var(--grey-light);border:1.5px solid var(--grey);}
.timeline-label{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--black);}
.timeline-date{font-size:11px;color:var(--grey);margin-top:1px;}

/* FOOTER */
footer{
  margin-top:20px;
  background:var(--green-deep);
  padding:22px 40px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
}
.footer-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.footer-logo img{height:28px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;filter:brightness(10);}
.footer-tagline{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);letter-spacing:0.05em;}
.footer-copy{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);}

/* EMBED NOTICE */
.embed-notice{
  background:var(--green-light);border:1.5px dashed var(--green-mid);
  border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:12px 16px;
  font-size:12px;color:var(--green-dark);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;
}

@media(max-width:900px){
  .main{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .hero h1{font-size:26px;}
  nav{padding:0 20px;}
  .progress-section,.main{padding-left:20px;padding-right:20px;}
  footer{padding:20px;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;text-align:center;}
}

/* INVOICE SECTION */
.invoice-section{padding:0 40px 28px;}
.invoice-section-title{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--grey);letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px;}
.invoice-header-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--green-mid);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px 24px;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px;}
.invoice-summary{display:flex;gap:28px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.inv-sum-item{text-align:center;}
.inv-sum-val{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--black);}
.inv-sum-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--grey);margin-top:2px;}
.inv-filter-btns{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.inv-filter-btn{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:20px;border:1.5px solid var(--grey-light);background:var(--white);color:var(--grey);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;}
.inv-filter-btn.active{background:var(--green);color:#fff;border-color:var(--green);}
.invoice-table-wrap{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--grey-light);border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;}
.inv-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}
.inv-table thead tr{background:var(--green-deep);}
.inv-table thead th{font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;letter-spacing:0.05em;text-transform:uppercase;}
.inv-table tbody tr{border-bottom:1px solid var(--grey-light);transition:background 0.1s;}
.inv-table tbody tr:hover{background:var(--surface);}
.inv-table tbody tr:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.inv-table tbody td{padding:14px 16px;font-size:13px;color:var(--black);}
.inv-table tbody td.inv-num{font-family:var(--font-head);font-weight:700;color:var(--green-dark);}
.inv-table tbody td.inv-amount{font-family:var(--font-head);font-weight:700;}
.inv-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:20px;letter-spacing:0.03em;}
.status-paid{background:#D5F5E3;color:#1E8449;}
.status-unpaid{background:#FEF9E7;color:#B7770D;}
.status-overdue{background:#FADBD8;color:#922B21;}
.status-partial{background:#D6EAF8;color:#1A5276;}
.inv-dl-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green-dark);background:var(--green-light);padding:5px 11px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:none;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;transition:background 0.15s;}
.inv-dl-btn:hover{background:var(--green-mid);}
.inv-empty{padding:40px;text-align:center;color:var(--grey);font-size:13px;}
.inv-loading{padding:32px;text-align:center;color:var(--grey);font-size:13px;}
.inv-notice{padding:14px 18px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:12px;margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1.6;display:none;}
.inv-setup-guide{margin:0 40px 28px;padding:20px 24px;background:var(--green-light);border-radius:var(--radius);border:1.5px dashed var(--green-mid);font-size:12px;color:var(--green-deep);line-height:1.8;}
.inv-setup-guide code{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.07);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;}
@media(max-width:900px){
  .invoice-section{padding-left:20px;padding-right:20px;}
  .inv-table thead th:nth-child(4),.inv-table tbody td:nth-child(4){display:none;}
  .inv-setup-guide{margin-left:20px;margin-right:20px;}
}

</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Ritzy logo"/>
    <span class="nav-badge">Client Portal</span>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;">
    <div class="nav-right">Employee Transport Onboarding</div>
    <button onclick="openAdminLogin()" style="background:var(--green);color:#fff;border:none;padding:7px 18px;border-radius:20px;font-family:var(--font-head);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:0.03em;">&#128274; Admin Dashboard</button>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- ADMIN LOGIN OVERLAY -->
<div id="admin-login-overlay" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);z-index:9000;justify-content:center;align-items:center;">
  <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:40px;width:340px;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:8px;">&#128274;</div>
    <h2 style="font-family:var(--font-head);color:var(--green-dark);font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:6px;">Admin Access</h2>
    <p style="color:var(--grey);font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:20px;">Enter password to view dashboard</p>
    <input id="admin-pw-input" type="password" placeholder="Enter password" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')checkAdminPw()" style="width:100%;border:1.5px solid var(--green-mid);padding:10px 14px;border-radius:10px;font-size:1rem;outline:none;margin-bottom:8px;"/>
    <p id="admin-pw-error" style="color:red;font-size:0.8rem;min-height:16px;margin-bottom:8px;"></p>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;">
      <button onclick="checkAdminPw()" style="background:var(--green);color:#fff;border:none;padding:10px 24px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;">Login</button>
      <button onclick="closeAdminLogin()" style="background:var(--grey-light);color:var(--grey);border:none;padding:10px 24px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;">Cancel</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ADMIN DASHBOARD OVERLAY -->
<div id="admin-dashboard-overlay" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--surface);z-index:8000;overflow-y:auto;">
  <div style="max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:32px 24px;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:28px;">
      <div>
        <h1 style="font-family:var(--font-head);color:var(--green-dark);font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:4px;">&#128202; Admin Dashboard</h1>
        <p style="color:var(--grey);font-size:0.9rem;">Live form submissions from Company Requirement Form</p>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;">
        <button onclick="loadDashboardData()" style="background:var(--green);color:#fff;border:none;padding:9px 20px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.85rem;">&#128260; Refresh</button>
        <button onclick="closeAdminDashboard()" style="background:#fee2e2;color:#dc2626;border:none;padding:9px 20px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.85rem;">&#10005; Close</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;margin-bottom:28px;">
      <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:20px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--green);" id="stat-total">-</div>
        <div style="color:var(--grey);font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;margin-top:4px;">Total Submissions</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:20px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--green);" id="stat-cabs">-</div>
        <div style="color:var(--grey);font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;margin-top:4px;">Total EV Cabs Requested</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:20px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--green);" id="stat-companies">-</div>
        <div style="color:var(--grey);font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;margin-top:4px;">Unique Companies</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:20px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--green);word-break:break-word;" id="stat-latest">-</div>
        <div style="color:var(--grey);font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;margin-top:4px;">Latest Submission</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:14px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="padding:20px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--grey-light);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;">
        <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-head);color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;">All Submissions</h3>
        <span id="dash-last-refreshed" style="color:var(--grey);font-size:0.75rem;"></span>
      </div>
      <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
        <table id="dash-table" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.82rem;">
          <thead>
            <tr style="background:var(--green-light);">
              <th style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;">#</th>
              <th style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;">Company</th>
              <th style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;">SPOC</th>
              <th style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;">Contact</th>
              <th style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;">Email</th>
              <th style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;">Location</th>
              <th style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;">EV Cabs</th>
              <th style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;">Shifts</th>
              <th style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;">Shift Time</th>
              <th style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;">Working Days</th>
              <th style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;color:var(--green-dark);font-weight:700;">Start Date</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody id="dash-tbody">
            <tr><td colspan="11" style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:var(--grey);">Loading...</td></tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  function openAdminLogin(){
    document.getElementById('admin-login-overlay').style.display='flex';
    document.getElementById('admin-pw-input').value='';
    document.getElementById('admin-pw-error').innerText='';
    setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('admin-pw-input').focus(),100);
  }
  function closeAdminLogin(){document.getElementById('admin-login-overlay').style.display='none';}
  function closeAdminDashboard(){document.getElementById('admin-dashboard-overlay').style.display='none';}
  function checkAdminPw(){
    const pw=document.getElementById('admin-pw-input').value;
    if(pw==='Admin@123'){
      closeAdminLogin();
      document.getElementById('admin-dashboard-overlay').style.display='block';
      loadDashboardData();
    } else {
      document.getElementById('admin-pw-error').innerText='Incorrect password. Try again.';
      document.getElementById('admin-pw-input').value='';
      document.getElementById('admin-pw-input').focus();
    }
  }
  async function loadDashboardData(){
    const tbody=document.getElementById('dash-tbody');
    tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="11" style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:var(--grey);">Loading submissions...</td></tr>';
    try{
      const res=await fetch("https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbyQUlaLNknPF_NTkam1xgsIg8x_oHWm5NLC3o2herjDpAgptk-N2aNYRmZv6CP4LFsR/exec",{method:"GET"});
      const data=await res.json();
      renderDashboard(data);
    } catch(e){
      tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="11" style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:#dc2626;">Could not load data. Add a GET handler to your Apps Script that returns all rows as JSON.</td></tr>';
    }
  }
  function renderDashboard(data){
    const rows=Array.isArray(data)?data:(data.data||data.submissions||[]);
    const tbody=document.getElementById('dash-tbody');
    document.getElementById('stat-total').innerText=rows.length||'0';
    const totalCabs=rows.reduce((s,r)=>s+(parseInt(r.totalEVCabs)||0),0);
    document.getElementById('stat-cabs').innerText=totalCabs||'0';
    const companies=new Set(rows.map(r=>r.companyName).filter(Boolean));
    document.getElementById('stat-companies').innerText=companies.size||'0';
    document.getElementById('stat-latest').innerText=rows.length?(rows[rows.length-1].companyName||'-'):'-';
    document.getElementById('dash-last-refreshed').innerText='Refreshed: '+new Date().toLocaleTimeString();
    if(!rows.length){
      tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="11" style="padding:40px;text-align:center;color:var(--grey);">No submissions yet.</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML=rows.map((r,i)=>`
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--grey-light);${i%2===0?'background:#fafff9':''}">
        <td style="padding:12px 16px;color:var(--grey);">${i+1}</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green-dark);">${r.companyName||'-'}</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 16px;">${r.spocName||'-'}</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 16px;">${r.contactNumber||'-'}</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 16px;">${r.email||'-'}</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 16px;">${r.officeLocation||'-'}</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:center;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);">${r.totalEVCabs||'-'}</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:center;">${r.numberOfShifts||'-'}</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 16px;">${r.shiftFrom?r.shiftFrom:''}${r.shiftFrom&&r.shiftTo?' - ':''}${r.shiftTo?r.shiftTo:''}</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 16px;text-align:center;">${r.workingDaysPerWeek||'-'}</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 16px;">${r.startDateRequired||'-'}</td>
      </tr>`).join('');
  }
</script>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-client-tag">
      <span></span>
      [CLIENT COMPANY NAME] &nbsp;·&nbsp; Onboarding Portal
    </div>
    <h1>Welcome to Your<br/><em>Transport Onboarding</em> Portal</h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">Ride Smart. Ride Green. Ride Ritzy.</p>
    <div class="hero-steps-row">
      <div class="hero-step-pill"><span class="pill-num">1</span> Company Requirements</div>
      <div class="hero-step-pill"><span class="pill-num">2</span> Employee Roster</div>
      <div class="hero-step-pill"><span class="pill-num">3</span> Ops Alignment</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROGRESS TRACKER -->
<div class="progress-section">
  <h2>Onboarding progress</h2>
  <div class="progress-track">
    <div class="prog-item">
      <div class="prog-circle prog-active">1</div>
      <div class="prog-label">Requirements</div>
      <div class="prog-sub">In progress</div>
    </div>
    <div class="prog-item">
      <div class="prog-circle prog-todo">2</div>
      <div class="prog-label">Employee Roster</div>
      <div class="prog-sub">Upcoming</div>
    </div>
    <div class="prog-item">
      <div class="prog-circle prog-todo">3</div>
      <div class="prog-label">Ops Alignment</div>
      <div class="prog-sub">Upcoming</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MAIN -->
<div class="main">

  <!-- STEPS COL -->
  <div class="steps-col">

    <!-- STEP 1 -->
    <div class="step-card active-card">
      <div class="card-top">
        <div class="card-icon-wrap icon-green">📋</div>
        <span class="status-badge badge-progress">⏳ In Progress</span>
      </div>
      <div class="card-num-title">
        <span class="step-num">STEP 01</span>
      </div>
      <div class="card-title">Company Requirement Form</div>
      <p class="card-desc">One-time intake form covering your fleet size, shift timings, billing preference, vehicle type, safety requirements, and contract details. This helps us design your transport plan.</p>
      <div class="card-meta">
        <span class="meta-item"><span class="meta-icon">⏱</span> ~10 minutes</span>
        <span class="meta-item"><span class="meta-icon">📌</span> One-time only</span>
      </div>
      <div id="ritzy-form-wrap" style="margin-top:20px;">

        <!-- Toggle Buttons -->
        <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <button id="btn-org" onclick="switchForm('organisation')"
            style="padding:10px 28px;border-radius:14px;font-weight:800;font-size:1rem;border:2px solid #45b532;background:#45b532;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s;">
            Organisation
          </button>
          <button id="btn-ind" onclick="switchForm('individual')"
            style="padding:10px 28px;border-radius:14px;font-weight:800;font-size:1rem;border:2px solid #45b532;background:#fff;color:#45b532;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s;">
            Individual
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- ORGANISATION FORM -->
        <div id="form-organisation">

          <!-- Section 1 -->
          <div class="ritzy-section" style="background:#fff;border:2px solid #45b532;border-radius:20px;padding:24px;margin-bottom:20px;transition:background 0.3s;"
            onmouseover="this.style.background='#196111'" onmouseout="this.style.background='#fff'">
            <h3 class="ritzy-sec-title" style="color:#45b532;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;text-align:center;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(69,181,50,0.3);padding-bottom:10px;margin-bottom:20px;transition:color 0.3s;">
              COMPANY &amp; SPOC INFORMATION
            </h3>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;">
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Company Name</label>
                <input id="rf_companyName" type="text" placeholder="Enter company name"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('companyName')"/>
                <p id="err_companyName" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">SPOC Name</label>
                <input id="rf_spocName" type="text" placeholder="Enter SPOC name"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('spocName')"/>
                <p id="err_spocName" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Contact Number</label>
                <input id="rf_contactNumber" type="tel" maxlength="10" placeholder="10 Digit Number"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('contactNumber')"/>
                <p id="err_contactNumber" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Email</label>
                <input id="rf_email" type="email" placeholder="Enter Email"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('email')"/>
                <p id="err_email" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div style="grid-column:span 2;">
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Office Location</label>
                <input id="rf_officeLocation" type="text" placeholder="Enter office location"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('officeLocation')"/>
                <p id="err_officeLocation" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Section 2 -->
          <div class="ritzy-section" style="background:#fff;border:2px solid #45b532;border-radius:20px;padding:24px;margin-bottom:20px;transition:background 0.3s;"
            onmouseover="this.style.background='#196111'" onmouseout="this.style.background='#fff'">
            <h3 class="ritzy-sec-title" style="color:#45b532;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;text-align:center;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(69,181,50,0.3);padding-bottom:10px;margin-bottom:20px;transition:color 0.3s;">
              FLEET &amp; DEMAND PLANNING
            </h3>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;">
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Total EV Cabs Required</label>
                <input id="rf_totalEVCabs" type="text" placeholder="Only Numbers"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('totalEVCabs')"/>
                <p id="err_totalEVCabs" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Number of Shifts</label>
                <input id="rf_numberOfShifts" type="text" placeholder="Only Numbers"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('numberOfShifts')"/>
                <p id="err_numberOfShifts" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Shift Timing From</label>
                <input id="rf_shiftFrom" type="time"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"/>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Shift Timing To</label>
                <input id="rf_shiftTo" type="time"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"/>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Weekly Off Pattern</label>
                <input id="rf_weeklyOffPattern" type="text" placeholder="e.g., 2 (Saturday & Sunday)"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('weeklyOffPattern')"/>
                <p id="err_weeklyOffPattern" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Working Days Per Week</label>
                <input id="rf_workingDaysPerWeek" type="text" placeholder="Only Numbers"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('workingDaysPerWeek')"/>
                <p id="err_workingDaysPerWeek" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Start Date Required</label>
                <input id="rf_startDateRequired" type="date"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('startDateRequired')"/>
                <p id="err_startDateRequired" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Service Duration From</label>
                <input id="rf_serviceDurationFrom" type="date"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('serviceDurationFrom')"/>
                <p id="err_serviceDurationFrom" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div style="grid-column:span 2;">
                <label class="ritzy-label" style="color:#45b532;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Service Duration To</label>
                <input id="rf_serviceDurationTo" type="date"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('serviceDurationTo')"/>
                <p id="err_serviceDurationTo" style="color:red;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Org Submit -->
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;margin-top:16px;">
            <button onclick="submitOrgForm()"
              style="background:#fff;color:#45b532;padding:12px 40px;border-radius:14px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;border:2px solid #45b532;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s;"
              onmouseover="this.style.background='#196111';this.style.color='#fff';"
              onmouseout="this.style.background='#fff';this.style.color='#45b532';">
              Submit Your Details
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- INDIVIDUAL FORM -->
        <div id="form-individual" style="display:none;">
          <div class="ritzy-section" style="background:#196111;border:2px solid #45b532;border-radius:20px;padding:24px;margin-bottom:20px;transition:background 0.3s;"
            onmouseover="this.style.background='#fff'" onmouseout="this.style.background='#196111'">
            <h3 style="color:#fff;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;text-align:center;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);padding-bottom:10px;margin-bottom:20px;transition:color 0.3s;">
              INDIVIDUAL INFORMATION
            </h3>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;">
              <div>
                <label style="color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Full Name</label>
                <input id="ind_fullName" type="text" placeholder="Enter Full Name"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('ind_fullName')"/>
                <p id="err_ind_fullName" style="color:#fca5a5;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style="color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Contact Number</label>
                <input id="ind_contactNumber" type="tel" maxlength="10" placeholder="10 Digit Number"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('ind_contactNumber')"/>
                <p id="err_ind_contactNumber" style="color:#fca5a5;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style="color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Email</label>
                <input id="ind_email" type="email" placeholder="Enter Email"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('ind_email')"/>
                <p id="err_ind_email" style="color:#fca5a5;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style="color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;">Address</label>
                <input id="ind_address" type="text" placeholder="Enter Address"
                  style="width:100%;border:1px solid #d1d5db;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:6px;color:#374151;background:#fff;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;"
                  oninput="clearErr('ind_address')"/>
                <p id="err_ind_address" style="color:#fca5a5;font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:4px;"></p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Individual Submit -->
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;margin-top:16px;">
            <button onclick="submitIndForm()"
              style="background:#fff;color:#45b532;padding:12px 40px;border-radius:14px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:800;border:2px solid #45b532;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s;"
              onmouseover="this.style.background='#196111';this.style.color='#fff';"
              onmouseout="this.style.background='#fff';this.style.color='#45b532';">
              Submit Your Details
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Success Popup -->
        <div id="ritzy-success-popup" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);z-index:9999;justify-content:center;align-items:center;">
          <div style="background:#15803d;padding:40px;border-radius:20px;text-align:center;width:320px;">
            <h2 style="color:#fff;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:10px;">Success &#x2705;</h2>
            <p style="color:#fff;font-size:1rem;">Your Form Is Submitted Successfully</p>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <script>
        var activeRitzyForm = 'organisation';

        function switchForm(type) {
          activeRitzyForm = type;
          document.getElementById('form-organisation').style.display = type === 'organisation' ? 'block' : 'none';
          document.getElementById('form-individual').style.display = type === 'individual' ? 'block' : 'none';
          var btnOrg = document.getElementById('btn-org');
          var btnInd = document.getElementById('btn-ind');
          if (type === 'organisation') {
            btnOrg.style.background = '#45b532'; btnOrg.style.color = '#fff';
            btnInd.style.background = '#fff'; btnInd.style.color = '#45b532';
          } else {
            btnInd.style.background = '#45b532'; btnInd.style.color = '#fff';
            btnOrg.style.background = '#fff'; btnOrg.style.color = '#45b532';
          }
        }

        function clearErr(id) {
          var el = document.getElementById('err_' + id);
          if (el) el.innerText = '';
        }

        function getVal(id) { return document.getElementById(id).value.trim(); }
        function setErr(id, msg) { var el = document.getElementById('err_' + id); if(el) el.innerText = msg; }

        function showSuccessPopup() {
          var popup = document.getElementById('ritzy-success-popup');
          popup.style.display = 'flex';
          setTimeout(function() { popup.style.display = 'none'; }, 3000);
        }

        function submitOrgForm() {
          var valid = true;
          // Clear all errors
          ['companyName','spocName','contactNumber','email','officeLocation',
           'totalEVCabs','numberOfShifts','weeklyOffPattern','workingDaysPerWeek',
           'startDateRequired','serviceDurationFrom','serviceDurationTo']
          .forEach(function(f) { clearErr(f); });

          if (!getVal('rf_companyName'))   { setErr('companyName', 'Company Name is required'); valid=false; }
          if (!getVal('rf_spocName'))      { setErr('spocName', 'SPOC Name is required'); valid=false; }
          if (!/^[0-9]{10}$/.test(getVal('rf_contactNumber'))) { setErr('contactNumber', 'Must be exactly 10 digits'); valid=false; }
          if (!/^[A-Z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z]{2,}$/i.test(getVal('rf_email'))) { setErr('email', 'Invalid Email Address'); valid=false; }
          if (!getVal('rf_officeLocation')) { setErr('officeLocation', 'Office Location is required'); valid=false; }
          if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(getVal('rf_totalEVCabs')) || !getVal('rf_totalEVCabs')) { setErr('totalEVCabs', 'Only numbers allowed'); valid=false; }
          if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(getVal('rf_numberOfShifts')) || !getVal('rf_numberOfShifts')) { setErr('numberOfShifts', 'Only numbers allowed'); valid=false; }
          if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(getVal('rf_weeklyOffPattern')) || !getVal('rf_weeklyOffPattern')) { setErr('weeklyOffPattern', 'Only numbers allowed'); valid=false; }
          if (!/^[0-9]+$/.test(getVal('rf_workingDaysPerWeek')) || !getVal('rf_workingDaysPerWeek')) { setErr('workingDaysPerWeek', 'Only numbers allowed'); valid=false; }
          if (!document.getElementById('rf_startDateRequired').value) { setErr('startDateRequired', 'Start date is required'); valid=false; }
          if (!document.getElementById('rf_serviceDurationFrom').value) { setErr('serviceDurationFrom', 'Service start date is required'); valid=false; }
          if (!document.getElementById('rf_serviceDurationTo').value) { setErr('serviceDurationTo', 'Service end date is required'); valid=false; }
          if (!valid) return;

          var formData = {
            formType: 'organisation',
            companyName: getVal('rf_companyName'),
            spocName: getVal('rf_spocName'),
            contactNumber: getVal('rf_contactNumber'),
            email: getVal('rf_email'),
            officeLocation: getVal('rf_officeLocation'),
            totalEVCabs: getVal('rf_totalEVCabs'),
            numberOfShifts: getVal('rf_numberOfShifts'),
            shiftFrom: document.getElementById('rf_shiftFrom').value,
            shiftTo: document.getElementById('rf_shiftTo').value,
            weeklyOffPattern: getVal('rf_weeklyOffPattern'),
            workingDaysPerWeek: getVal('rf_workingDaysPerWeek'),
            startDateRequired: document.getElementById('rf_startDateRequired').value,
            serviceDurationFrom: document.getElementById('rf_serviceDurationFrom').value,
            serviceDurationTo: document.getElementById('rf_serviceDurationTo').value,
          };

          fetch("https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbyQUlaLNknPF_NTkam1xgsIg8x_oHWm5NLC3o2herjDpAgptk-N2aNYRmZv6CP4LFsR/exec", {
            method: "POST", mode: "no-cors",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify(formData)
          }).then(function() {
            showSuccessPopup();
          }).catch(function() { alert("Something went wrong. Please try again."); });
        }

        function submitIndForm() {
          var valid = true;
          ['ind_fullName','ind_contactNumber','ind_email','ind_address']
          .forEach(function(f) { clearErr(f); });

          if (!getVal('ind_fullName')) { setErr('ind_fullName', 'Full Name is required'); valid=false; }
          if (!/^[0-9]{10}$/.test(getVal('ind_contactNumber'))) { setErr('ind_contactNumber', 'Must be exactly 10 digits'); valid=false; }
          if (!/^[A-Z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z]{2,}$/i.test(getVal('ind_email'))) { setErr('ind_email', 'Invalid Email Address'); valid=false; }
          if (!getVal('ind_address')) { setErr('ind_address', 'Address is required'); valid=false; }
          if (!valid) return;

          var formData = {
            formType: 'individual',
            fullName: getVal('ind_fullName'),
            contactNumber: getVal('ind_contactNumber'),
            email: getVal('ind_email'),
            address: getVal('ind_address'),
          };

          fetch("https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbyQUlaLNknPF_NTkam1xgsIg8x_oHWm5NLC3o2herjDpAgptk-N2aNYRmZv6CP4LFsR/exec", {
            method: "POST", mode: "no-cors",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify(formData)
          }).then(function() {
            showSuccessPopup();
          }).catch(function() { alert("Something went wrong. Please try again."); });
        }
      </script>

  </div>

  <!-- SIDEBAR -->
  <div class="sidebar">

<!-- INVOICE SECTION -->
<div class="invoice-section">
  <h2 class="invoice-section-title">Invoice history</h2>
  <div id="inv-notice" class="inv-notice"></div>
  <div class="invoice-header-row">
    <div class="invoice-summary">
      <div class="inv-sum-item"><div class="inv-sum-val" id="inv-total">—</div><div class="inv-sum-label">Total Invoices</div></div>
      <div class="inv-sum-item"><div class="inv-sum-val" id="inv-paid" style="color:var(--green)">—</div><div class="inv-sum-label">Paid</div></div>
      <div class="inv-sum-item"><div class="inv-sum-val" id="inv-unpaid" style="color:#B7770D">—</div><div class="inv-sum-label">Pending</div></div>
      <div class="inv-sum-item"><div class="inv-sum-val" id="inv-overdue" style="color:#922B21">—</div><div class="inv-sum-label">Overdue</div></div>
      <div class="inv-sum-item"><div class="inv-sum-val" id="inv-outstanding" style="color:var(--green-dark)">—</div><div class="inv-sum-label">Outstanding (₹)</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="inv-filter-btns">
      <button class="inv-filter-btn active" onclick="filterInvoices('all',this)">All</button>
      <button class="inv-filter-btn" onclick="filterInvoices('Paid',this)">Paid</button>
      <button class="inv-filter-btn" onclick="filterInvoices('Unpaid',this)">Unpaid</button>
      <button class="inv-filter-btn" onclick="filterInvoices('Overdue',this)">Overdue</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="invoice-table-wrap">
    <div id="inv-loading" class="inv-loading">🔄 Loading invoices…</div>
    <table class="inv-table" id="inv-table" style="display:none">
      <thead><tr><th>Invoice #</th><th>Period</th><th>Amount (₹)</th><th>Due Date</th><th>Status</th><th>Download</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody id="inv-tbody"></tbody>
    </table>
    <div id="inv-empty" class="inv-empty" style="display:none">No invoices found for this filter.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SETUP GUIDE (remove once sheet is connected) -->
<div class="inv-setup-guide">
  <strong>🔧 Ritzy Team — Invoice Setup Guide</strong><br/>
  <strong>Step 1.</strong> Open your Master Invoice Google Sheet<br/>
  <strong>Step 2.</strong> Create a sheet tab named <code>Invoices</code> with columns:<br/>
  &nbsp;&nbsp;<code>A: Client ID</code> &nbsp;<code>B: Invoice #</code> &nbsp;<code>C: Billing Period</code> &nbsp;<code>D: Amount (₹)</code> &nbsp;<code>E: Due Date</code> &nbsp;<code>F: Status</code> &nbsp;<code>G: PDF Link</code><br/>
  <strong>Step 3.</strong> File → Share → <em>Publish to web</em> → Sheet: Invoices → CSV → Publish → Copy URL<br/>
  <strong>Step 4.</strong> In this file, replace <code>[PASTE_CSV_URL]</code> in the script with your copied URL<br/>
  <strong>Step 5.</strong> Replace <code>[CLIENT_ID]</code> with the client code (e.g. <code>ACME001</code>) for each portal<br/>
  <strong>Step 6.</strong> Delete this guide box — the portal is live ✅
</div>

<script>
var CLIENT_ID = "[ACME001]";
var SHEET_CSV_URL = "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQx6b2CvCEJViXEuOv43zEVI8l8CzE_WadUv_gzhPaWRyTGv9a_Q_QnK4ksT1Uy8hB84exXpVS0w5K_/pub?gid=957258567&single=true&output=csv";
var allInvoices = [];

function parseCSV(csv){
  var lines = csv.trim().split("\n");
  var result = [];
  // Skip first 2 rows: row 0 = merged title, row 1 = column headers
  for(var i=2;i<lines.length;i++){
    var cols = [];
    var cur = "";
    var inq = false;
    for(var j=0;j<lines[i].length;j++){
      var ch = lines[i][j];
      if(ch==='"'){inq=!inq;}
      else if(ch===','&&!inq){cols.push(cur.trim());cur="";}
      else{cur+=ch;}
    }
    cols.push(cur.trim());
    if(cols[0].trim()===CLIENT_ID) result.push(cols);
  }
  return result;
}

function showNotice(msg,type){
  var el=document.getElementById("inv-notice");
  el.style.display="block";
  el.style.background=type==="warn"?"#FEF9E7":"#FADBD8";
  el.style.color=type==="warn"?"#B7770D":"#922B21";
  el.textContent=msg;
}

function updateSummary(data){
  var paid=data.filter(function(r){return r[7]==="Paid";}).length;
  var unpaid=data.filter(function(r){return r[7]==="Unpaid";}).length;
  var overdue=data.filter(function(r){return r[7]==="Overdue";}).length;
  var outstanding=0;
  data.forEach(function(r){
    if(r[7]==="Unpaid"||r[7]==="Overdue"||r[7]==="Partial"){
      outstanding+=parseFloat((r[4]||"0").replace(/,/g,"")||0);
    }
  });
  document.getElementById("inv-total").textContent=data.length;
  document.getElementById("inv-paid").textContent=paid;
  document.getElementById("inv-unpaid").textContent=unpaid;
  document.getElementById("inv-overdue").textContent=overdue;
  document.getElementById("inv-outstanding").textContent=outstanding>0?outstanding.toLocaleString("en-IN"):"0";
}

function renderTable(data){
  var tbody=document.getElementById("inv-tbody");
  tbody.innerHTML="";
  if(data.length===0){
    document.getElementById("inv-empty").style.display="block";
    document.getElementById("inv-table").style.display="none";
    return;
  }
  document.getElementById("inv-empty").style.display="none";
  document.getElementById("inv-table").style.display="table";
  var sc={"Paid":"status-paid","Unpaid":"status-unpaid","Overdue":"status-overdue","Partial":"status-partial"};
  data.forEach(function(r){
    var invNum=r[2]||"—";var period=r[3]||"—";var amount=r[4]||"—";var due=r[6]||"—";var status=r[7]||"—";var pdf=r[8]||"";
    var cls=sc[status]||"status-unpaid";
    var dl=pdf?'<a href="'+pdf+'" target="_blank" class="inv-dl-btn">⬇ Download</a>':'<span style="color:var(--grey);font-size:11px;">Pending</span>';
    tbody.innerHTML+='<tr><td class="inv-num">'+invNum+'</td><td>'+period+'</td><td class="inv-amount">₹'+amount+'</td><td>'+due+'</td><td><span class="inv-status '+cls+'">'+status+'</span></td><td>'+dl+'</td></tr>';
  });
}

function filterInvoices(status,btn){
  document.querySelectorAll(".inv-filter-btn").forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove("active");});
  btn.classList.add("active");
  var filtered=status==="all"?allInvoices:allInvoices.filter(function(r){return r[7]===status;});
  renderTable(filtered);
}

function loadInvoices(){
  document.getElementById("inv-loading").style.display="block";
  document.getElementById("inv-loading").innerHTML="🔄 Loading invoices...";
  if(SHEET_CSV_URL==="[PASTE_CSV_URL]"){
    allInvoices=[
      [CLIENT_ID,"INV-2025-001","May 2025","50,000","10 Jun 2025","Paid",""],
      [CLIENT_ID,"INV-2025-002","Jun 2025","50,000","10 Jul 2025","Unpaid",""],
      [CLIENT_ID,"INV-2025-003","Apr 2025","48,500","10 May 2025","Paid",""]
    ];
    updateSummary(allInvoices);
    renderTable(allInvoices);
    document.getElementById("inv-loading").style.display="none";
    showNotice("📋 Showing sample data. Connect your Master Invoice Sheet to display live invoices (see setup guide below).","warn");
    return;
  }
  fetch(SHEET_CSV_URL)
    .then(function(r){
      if(!r.ok) throw new Error("HTTP "+r.status);
      return r.text();
    })
    .then(function(csv){
      // Debug: show first 3 rows raw
      var rawLines = csv.trim().split("\n").slice(0,4);
      console.log("RAW CSV ROWS:", rawLines);
      console.log("CLIENT_ID looking for:", CLIENT_ID);

      allInvoices = parseCSV(csv);
      console.log("MATCHED ROWS:", allInvoices.length, allInvoices);

      document.getElementById("inv-loading").style.display="none";
      if(allInvoices.length===0){
        // Show raw first row to help diagnose
        var firstDataRow = csv.trim().split("\n")[1] || "";
        var firstCol = firstDataRow.split(",")[0].replace(/"/g,"").trim();
        showNotice("No invoices found for CLIENT_ID=\""+CLIENT_ID+"\". First data row col A=\""+firstCol+"\" — check they match exactly.","warn");
        renderTable([]);
        return;
      }
      updateSummary(allInvoices);
      renderTable(allInvoices);
    })
    .catch(function(err){
      document.getElementById("inv-loading").style.display="none";
      showNotice("Could not load sheet: "+err.message+". Make sure the sheet is published (File → Share → Publish to web).","error");
      console.error("Invoice fetch error:", err);
    });
}
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",loadInvoices);
</script>

    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Ritzy"/>
    <span class="footer-tagline">Ride Smart. Ride Green. Ride Ritzy.</span>
